title: AstraZeneca Wainua Phase III Disappoints
headline: AstraZeneca's Phase III trial for Wainua in cardiomyopathy failed to meet expectations.
key_facts: Phase III failure in cardiomyopathy indication

title: Corcept Insider Sale After Ovarian Cancer Approval
headline: Corcept CDO William Guyer sold 20,000 shares ($1.9M) post-relacorilant approval, with $1.05B 2026 revenue outlook and late-2026 Cushing's PDUFA pending.
key_facts: 20,000 shares sold at $94.04/share = $1.9M on July 7, 2026; 83% of direct holdings liquidated; $1.05B 2026 revenue outlook; market cap $10.1B; relacorilant approved March 25, 2026 for platinum-resistant ovarian cancer; Cushing's NDA resubmitted June 17, 2026 with ~late 2026 PDUFA; 10b5-1 plan established November 27, 2024

title: Q32 Bio SIGNAL-AA 36-Week Topline Due
headline: Q32 Bio to report 36-week Part B topline from Phase 2a SIGNAL-AA trial of bempikibart in alopecia areata on July 13, 2026.
key_facts: Phase 2a SIGNAL-AA trial Part B; 36-week topline readout; catalyst date July 13, 2026

title: Celcuity Gedatolisib PDUFA on July 17
headline: Celcuity faces July 17, 2026 PDUFA for gedatolisib in HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA wild-type advanced breast cancer under Real-Time Oncology Review.
key_facts: PDUFA July 17, 2026; indication HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA wild-type advanced breast cancer; review pathway Real-Time Oncology Review (RTOR)

title: Novartis Pelacarsen HORIZON Readout Pending
headline: Novartis' pelacarsen Phase 3 HORIZON CV outcomes trial enrollment complete at 8,325 participants with up to 80% Lp(a) reduction in Phase 2; readout still awaited.
key_facts: Phase 3 HORIZON enrollment complete: 8,325 participants; Phase 2 achieved up to 80% Lp(a) reduction at 80 mg monthly dose; expected 1H 2026 readout (pending); regulatory submissions guided for 2H 2026; Korea readout guided early next year

title: Scribe Therapeutics IPO on File
headline: Scribe Therapeutics S-1 filed July 2, 2026 for Nasdaq listing (ticker SCTX) as 14th venture-backed biotech IPO of 2026; co-founder Jennifer Doudna; collaborations with Biogen, Sanofi, Eli Lilly.
key_facts: S-1 filed July 2, 2026; Nasdaq Global Market ticker SCTX; 14th biotech IPO of 2026; co-founder Jennifer Doudna (Nobel laureate); CEO Benjamin Oakes; Australian trial readout planned 2027

title: Eli Lilly Orforglipron (Foundayo) Already Approved
headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 orforglipron (Foundayo) approved April 1, 2026 for adults with obesity/overweight + comorbidities; launch described as muted vs Novo's Wegovy pill.
key_facts: FDA approval ~April 1, 2026; indication: adults with obesity/overweight + weight-related comorbidities; brand Foundayo; Lilly's second obesity product; no food/water/timing restrictions; launch characterized as muted

title: Padcev + Keytruda Approved for MIBC (Neoadjuvant/Adjuvant)
headline: FDA approved Padcev (enfortumab vedotin-ejfv) + Keytruda (pembrolizumab) as neoadjuvant/adjuvant for muscle-invasive bladder cancer on July 10-11, 2026.
key_facts: FDA approval July 10-11, 2026; indication: muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC) neoadjuvant/adjuvant setting; combination therapy

title: Bayer Raises €3B Equity Capital from Apollo
headline: Bayer secured €3 billion capital equity infusion deal with Apollo on July 10, 2026.
key_facts: €3 billion equity capital infusion; deal closed July 10, 2026; partner Apollo

title: Hengrui/Elevar HCC Combo Rejected 3rd Time
headline: FDA rejected Hengrui/Elevar PD-1 combination (rivoceranib + camrelizumab) for first-line unresectable HCC for the third time; decision expected July 23, 2026.
key_facts: Third FDA rejection; indication: first-line unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC); drugs rivoceranib + camrelizumab; FDA decision date July 23, 2026

title: Bausch + Lomb BL1107 Phase II Disappoints
headline: Bausch + Lomb reported disappointing Phase II topline for BL1107 in glaucoma on July 11, 2026.
key_facts: Phase II topline failure; indication: glaucoma; readout date July 11, 2026

title: Vertex Acquires Crinetics for ~$99M+
headline: Vertex announced takeover bid for Crinetics Technologies; Crinetics shares surged 99% to $83.64 pre-market; Vertex's largest-ever acquisition.
key_facts: Vertex acquisition of Crinetics; pre-market share jump +99% to $83.64; transaction date ~July 7, 2026; Vertex's largest-ever M&A deal

title: GSK Closes Largest Oncology Deal in >1 Decade
headline: GSK closed its largest oncology acquisition in over a decade, acquiring two near-launch lung cancer assets via all-cash tender and second-step merger under CEO Luke Miels.
key_facts: GSK's largest oncology deal in >10 years; two near-launch lung cancer assets; transaction structure: all-cash tender + second-step merger; CEO Luke Miels
